programme.title: King Cobra
programme.desc: The result of an experimental drug is a creature that is half cobra, half rattlesnake, and 30 feet long.

programme.title: Mongolian Death Worm
programme.desc: During an oil fracking operation, a nest of deadly creatures that have been dormant for centuries is awakened!

programme.title: Jessabelle
programme.desc: Returning to her childhood home, Jessabelle comes face to face with a long-tormented spirit.

programme.title: The Messengers
programme.desc: An ominous darkness invades a farm in North Dakota, and the Solomon family is torn apart by mayhem and murder.

programme.title: Cube
programme.desc: A group of six complete strangers are involuntarily placed in an endless maze containing deadly traps.

programme.title: Cube 2: Hypercube
programme.desc: Eight strangers awaken with no memory, in a cube-shaped room where the laws of physics do not always apply.

programme.title: Cube Zero
programme.desc: A programmer whose job is to watch over the reality-warping Cube defies orders to rescue an innocent mother.

programme.title: The Dark
programme.desc: A series of mysterious occurrences befall a young family who are haunted by the angry ghost of a child.

programme.title: The Gallows Act II
programme.desc: Ana Rue encounters a malevolent spirit after participating in a viral challenge.

programme.title: The Gathering
programme.desc: After losing her memory following a car crash, a woman begins having strange premonitions.

programme.title: The Grudge 3
programme.desc: A woman who holds the key to stopping the evil spirit of Kayako travels to the haunted Chicago apartment.

programme.title: Bandslam
programme.desc: Three students form an unlikely friendship after forming a band together in order to compete in a competition.

programme.title: Equals
programme.desc: In an emotionless utopia, two people fall in love when they regain their feelings from a mysterious disease.

programme.title: Miss Potter
programme.desc: Beatrix Potter overcame a domineering mother and chauvinism to become a best-selling children's author.

programme.title: Movie
programme.desc: MovieSphere provides Hollywood movies, blockbuster hits, and general entertainment programming.
